content_body: Our first visit to Blue Ridge, GA exceeded our expectations! Your cabin is so lovely and comfortable. We enjoyed breakfast on the balcony, roasting marshmallows in the fire pit, competitive games of pool, and relaxing in the hot tub overlooking those views! WOW. Based on other recommendations in this journal, we took our kids (ages 6 and 9) to hike the Fall Branch Falls just minutes away and it was perfect! They got to touch the waterfalls. Great memory. We also love horseback riding with Appalachian Trail Rides and gem mining at the Lilly Pad Village down Aska Road. This was a fantastic family vacation and lots of memories were made! ~ Tampa, FL
title: First Visit to Blue Ridge, GA
